title: Open LLM Orchestrator (OLO) — declarative LLM workflow platform

papers.title: Declarative workflow graphs for multi-agent LLM orchestration
papers.summary: Describes portable workflow JSON, tool-call planners, and child-agent delegation in OLO.

papers.title: Temporal-backed execution of inline tool-call subgraphs
papers.summary: Runtime expansion of planner-produced tool sequences without child workflow dispatch.

keyFindings: OLO (Open LLM Orchestrator) separates workflow definitions from per-run inputs and worker deployment settings.
Scenario collections combine tool-call planners, mock catalog tools, and specialist child agents on a shared canvas.
